calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 H-retention-auxiliary-decay: BC-auxiliary persistence sweep and competence half-life (trajectory DV)
items.note: H-retention-auxiliary-decay: BC-install raw_view, then sweep bc_aux_coef PERSISTENCE (constant 0.5 / annealed 0.5->0.0 / off) and measure the competence HALF-LIFE, a trajectory statistic by construction. Tests whether the prior is not HELD rather than not PROTECTED. Uses linear_anneal, NOT warm_then_anneal: the latter is parameterised by the shared warm_start_fraction, which would couple BC persistence to the EXPLORATION anneal and confound the single intervention; the schedule is deliberately OUTSIDE the mode-gate. Verified: the three arms' config slices differ in the bc_aux triple and nothing else, with use_distributional_critic False on all three. Guards the substrate's documented schedule-guard alias (an annealed arm passes bc_aux_coef=0.0 with a nonzero schedule, so a guard reading the constant would yield an OFF arm labelled ANNEALED) by asserting the realised bc_aux_coef_first/_last actually moved. Declared null: half-life is invariant to the auxiliary schedule -> the prior is NOT being out-competed by the RL objective. Motivating evidence: V3-EXQ-780 ran a constant bc_aux_coef=0.5 throughout and still lost 20.933 -> 11.667, so a persistent-but-fixed auxiliary is insufficient and the schedule dimension is untested. GOV-FANOUT-1 PAIR with V3-EXQ-788 -- queued together, never singly: adjudicating a retention leg in isolation is how a confident-but-wrong elimination enters the frozen ledger (the 780/781/782 cluster is the validating instance). Pre-registered in hypothesis_space_registry.v1.json question 'competence_floor'. Substrate gate MET 2026-07-19: mech457_distributional_critic (ree-v3 8e88ffc), mech457_bc_aux_schedule (9a8dbae) and mech457_retention_trajectory_probe (7e4f6e9) all status=implemented. Re-derive brake does NOT fire: the producer-half autopsy failure_autopsy_MECH-457-gov-fanout-1-cluster-780-781-782_2026-07-18.json records re_derive_brake.fired=false on four grounds (different question, different null, different measurement, and a positive control at 20.933 that no braked autopsy possessed). GOV-REUSE-1 checked: decisive readout is the post-installation competence TRAJECTORY; runs 780/781/782 all record competence_trajectory absent (terminal-only), so it is NOT recoverable by reanalysis -> run. Reference build is the NON-REGRESSED 128-wide / 3x budget / z_world detached / credit-replay 3 / topk 32, NOT the 769-falsified 256/5x. raw_view only (780: post-BC 20.933 with 3/3 seeds taking, vs 0.583 with 0/3 on z_world). Honours the four registry measurement_requirement constraints verbatim: (1) records the competence TRAJECTORY via the probe hook, not terminal competence; (2) the grid enumerates a 'manipulation succeeded and then decayed' branch; (3) routes on the declared covariate post_bc_foraging_competence, not the terminal criterion alone (780's grid enumerated only a ~0 null and so scored a successful manipulation as a null); (4) an install that did not take self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue, never a retention verdict. Shared OFF cell mints reuse-eligible with include_driver_script_in_hash=False; the two legs' OFF fingerprints were verified IDENTICAL across drivers, so whichever runs first mints and the other reuses (no separate mint job queued -- neither sanctioned exception applies). Queue-only: promotes and demotes nothing; MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending.

items.title: MECH-440 noisy-selection-head propagation falsifier (CORRECTED RE-RUN of V3-EXQ-708): does NoisyNet weight noise carve committed-action diversity above a matched-pre-commit-variance temperature control, measured on a FRESH-SELECT-ONLY pre-commit DV?
items.note: diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING. INSTRUMENT REPAIR of V3-EXQ-708 per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-708_2026-07-19 (REE_assembly e0ebcbcecc), which found 708's pre-commit class entropy DV INVALID and MECH-440 therefore NEVER VALIDLY TESTED; 708's finding (supra-floor weight noise raised pre-commit entropy by 0.0 -> washes out at the F-dominated single-arena argmax) is WITHDRAWN and must not be re-cited, and its epistemic_category was corrected substrate_ceiling -> measurement_test_design_defect. DEFECT: 708 read agent.e3.last_precommit_probs (line 809) and .last_score_diagnostics (line 780) once per ENV STEP with no clear and no freshness guard, while E3 select() runs only on an E3 tick (agent.py:5429 returns the held action before the e3.select() call at agent.py:7011) at a 5-20-step MECH-093-arousal-modulated cadence (clock.py:52-70, default 10 at config.py:2017), so each probability vector was replicated by its hold duration (n_precommit_ticks == n_p2_ticks exactly, all 24 arm-seeds). The numel()==len(candidates) check at 708 line 812 is NOT a freshness guard (candidate count is constant). DIRECTIONAL, not merely an inflated n: exposure is ARM-DEPENDENT (A0_OFF and ARM_TEMP tick-identical on every seed while ARM_NOISE_SINGLE diverged +1.7%/+57.5%/+32.1% on divergent seeds 44/45/46). REPAIRS (autopsy sec 10, all six): (1) last_score_diagnostics AND last_precommit_probs cleared to None immediately before EVERY select_action, row recorded ONLY if repopulated (v3_exq_785a:525-543 pattern); (2) n_fresh_select / n_latched / fresh_select_yield emitted as telemetry; (3) per-arm-seed exposure_imbalance_vs_off recorded (reported, never gating); (4) per-seed fresh counts in the MANIFEST ITSELF, NOT a declared per_tick_sink (Phase 3 cloud workers POST only manifest_bytes -- twice-confirmed V3-EXQ-785 and 708, and the reason 708's contamination was NOT recoverable by reanalysis); (5) supersedes V3-EXQ-708 on entry + manifest; (6) stamp_recording_core, INCLUDING hoisting arm_results to the manifest top level so the multi-arm substrate_hash hoist actually fires -- 708 recorded no substrate_hash at all while every cell fingerprint had one. VENUE: ARM_NOISE_LOOPSEG DROPPED (708 ran 4 arms, 708a runs 3) -- V3-EXQ-707b returned evidence_direction=weakens on the single-arena-artefact sub-hypothesis with a valid non_degenerate null, concluding the conversion ceiling is intrinsic to MECH-439 F-dominance, so the route-to-ARC-110 outcome branch is settled and is deliberately not offered; ARC-110 is neither tagged nor tested. NEW readiness gate fresh_selects_sufficient (every arm-seed >= 30 genuine fresh selects) so an honest-but-underpowered DV self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue, NEVER a false weakens. CAUTION: enough_divergent_seeds cleared at EXACTLY threshold in 708 (3.0/3.0, zero headroom) -- one lost divergent seed self-routes requeue. RE-DERIVE BRAKE NOT FIRED: autopsy targets[0].re_derive_brake.fired=false (corrected category is measurement_test_design_defect, so the counting rule is not met); MECH-440's only standing substrate_ceiling autopsy (700d-708-single-arena-ceiling 2026-06-29) was superseded for its 708 target by this re-adjudication. Same shape as V3-EXQ-785 -> 785a, whose corrected instrument returned a clean well-powered null. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is pre-commit class entropy on a fresh-select-only denominator; checked the 708 manifest (only per-arm-seed scalars survive, metrics.json is 46 chars, no per_tick_sink, no substrate_hash) -> NOT recoverable by reanalysis -> run. Queued via coordinator POST /queue/add rather than a git queue-file edit: the working-tree experiment_queue.json carried 4 uncommitted entries (728a/734a/737a/742a) from active session interesting-noether-3f6326, so a file commit would have swept their in-flight work. validate_experiments --strict: OK, 0 warnings (708 fires stale-e3-diagnostics, 708a does not). Smoke: dry-run PASS 2026-07-19, 3/3 arms, worst_fresh=42 of 120 P2 ticks (guard working -- would be 120 under the defect), max_exposure_imbalance=0.288, correctly self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue for the toy run. Script landed ree-v3 2beb6a379f.

items.title: MECH-457 actor-critic ON/OFF re-run under the zworld encoder guard (RECORD policy; adds per-arm encoder_moved_in_p0/_in_ac)
items.note: ZWORLD-GUARD RE-RUN. Re-runs the driver with the untrained-world-encoder guard (experiments/_lib/zworld_encoder_guard.py) wired into its warmup call site. DETECTION ONLY -- no attempt is made to make the encoder train; that fix has a second part (the SD-018 head supervises max(resource_field_view), which decodes the demonstrator's action at chance, 0.2552 vs a 0.2534 floor) and the naive 'enable prescribed P0' is REFUTED in-corpus by SD-070 (prescribed P0 at dim=128 collapses z_world, participation ratio 9.21 -> 1.06). The fix is downstream of the V3-EXQ-783 adjudication and belongs to governance. Root cause (pinned structurally by tests/contracts/test_zworld_encoder_guard.py C3/C4): NO optimizer inside _train_all_on_agent covers ANY latent_stack parameter -- e2.parameters() (18), lateral_pfc.bias_head_parameters() (4), ofc.devaluation_bias_head_parameters() (4) all have ZERO overlap with the 61 latent_stack tensors, so p1_episodes>0 does not rescue it (P1 trains heads DOWNSTREAM of the encoder). Measured exposure, all four drivers bit-identical: 0/61 latent_stack, 0/4 world_encoder, max|delta| = 0.000e+00 (D3_hazard_free rung, seed 42, p0=p1=3, steps=20). Guard sits at each driver's OWN call site, never inside x734._train_all_on_agent, because 737 and 742 import that function and need different strictness. Shared shaper zworld_precondition() gives all four drivers one record shape (strict '>' comparator against a 0.0 floor: bit-identity is the signature, so an inclusive floor would recompute a frozen projection as MET). Diagnosis: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/zworld_bc_install_failure_V3-EXQ-780_2026-07-19.md. STRICT CHOICE = NON-STRICT (RECORD, do not refuse). JUSTIFICATION: P0 here is a SHARED, SYMMETRIC starting point for every actor-critic arm, and the manipulation under test is the ACTOR-CRITIC phase (cotrain on/off x sf on/off), not the warmup. A dead P0 biases all arms identically, so the cotrain-vs-not contrast -- the actual DV -- survives. Further, cotrain=True arms may train representation during P1 via _train_actor_critic, so a frozen P0 does not even imply a frozen encoder at eval. Refusing would destroy a valid contrast. The guard records TWO points per cell (P0 delta and AC-phase delta) and emits a per-arm encoder_moved_in_p0 / encoder_moved_in_ac summary -- that per-arm split is the load-bearing new diagnostic and answers whether AC rescues the cotrain arms. Guard entries go to interpretation.recorded_preconditions, NOT the flat interpretation.preconditions[], because the REE_assembly indexer adjudicates that list arm-blind and would return whole-run precondition_unmet on a run we deliberately do not refuse. Dry-run smoke PASS (exit 0, 16/16 cells; guard fired on all 8 AC cells, identically on cotrain and frozen arms, confirming the exposure is not gated on cotrain). validate_experiments --strict exit 0.
items.brake_exempt_reason: RE-DERIVE BRAKE ACKNOWLEDGED AND EXEMPT (validate_queue WARN: MECH-457 carries 8 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsies). Exempt under the third /queue-experiment Step 2.5b category -- 'a diagnostic whose purpose is to discriminate WHY the ceiling holds'. NOT a same-granularity re-test and NOT a power-bump: budget, arms, rungs, seeds and thresholds are byte-unchanged from V3-EXQ-742; the ONLY change is instrumentation. Its new per-arm encoder_moved_in_p0 / encoder_moved_in_ac diagnostic asks whether the prior MECH-457 null was CONFOUNDED by a world encoder that never trained (V3-EXQ-780 defect: 0/61 latent_stack, 0/4 world_encoder, max|delta| = 0.000e+00) -- it discriminates a CAUSE of the recorded ceiling rather than re-deriving it. PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING: route to /failure-autopsy before any governance action or MECH-457 promotion, exactly as V3-EXQ-742 stipulated. If the encoder is frozen in BOTH cotrain arms this run REMOVES a confound from the existing null; it cannot by itself clear the ceiling.

items.title: Channel-routing route_range cross-class magnitude replication (linux-x86_64)
items.note: Cross-machine-class MAGNITUDE replication of the channel-routing route_range contrast. Tests whether the Mac-higher route_range_mean direction seen in V3-EXQ-662 (ree-cloud-3, linux-x86_64) vs V3-EXQ-663 (DLAPTOP-4, darwin-arm64) -- 3/3 seeds, sign test p=0.125, not distinguishable from chance at n=3 -- survives at 10 paired seeds on the CORRECTED denominator. PRECONDITION FIXED FIRST (ree-v3 5433e3ab1c): the shared 662/663 driver read e3.last_score_diagnostics per env step without clearing the latch, so every held tick re-recorded the previous selection; measured 974 window ticks behind 110 genuine selections (8.85x). Point estimates were NOT materially affected (matched replay: +0.01% / +0.64% / -0.87%, sign-varying) -- what the defect invalidated was the effective n and any variance/significance claim built on it. 662/663 manifests deliberately NOT rewritten; the fix is prospective. DV route_range is sign-invariant, so the torch.linalg.svd singular-vector sign flip across LAPACK backends cannot confound it, and it is read upstream of the discrete quantizer per the rule never to assert exact committed ACTION streams across machine classes. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is per-seed ARM_1 route_range_mean on a corrected fresh-selection denominator; checked the only two recorded runs carrying it (662/663) -- both predate the recording standard (no substrate_hash), carry only 3 seeds, and their denominator is the defect under repair, so not recoverable -> run. The cross-class comparison is a POST-HOC analysis over the two manifests; neither run can evaluate it alone. Queued via coordinator /queue/add rather than a git append: experiment_queue.json held 4 uncommitted entries from a concurrent session at queue time. THIS LEG: linux-x86_64, pinned ree-cloud-3. Paired leg: V3-EXQ-791 (darwin-arm64, DLAPTOP-4.local). RUNTIME: estimated_minutes=753 is MEASURED, not extrapolated -- 28.23 s/episode on a contended Mac (load ~9.8) -> 37.6 min/cell x 20 cells = 12.55h/leg. Measured under contention, so this is an UPPER bound; an idle machine will be faster.

items.title: REE-latent policy-head competence probe re-run under the zworld encoder guard (RECORD policy)
items.note: ZWORLD-GUARD RE-RUN. Re-runs the driver with the untrained-world-encoder guard (experiments/_lib/zworld_encoder_guard.py) wired into its warmup call site. DETECTION ONLY -- no attempt is made to make the encoder train; that fix has a second part (the SD-018 head supervises max(resource_field_view), which decodes the demonstrator's action at chance, 0.2552 vs a 0.2534 floor) and the naive 'enable prescribed P0' is REFUTED in-corpus by SD-070 (prescribed P0 at dim=128 collapses z_world, participation ratio 9.21 -> 1.06). The fix is downstream of the V3-EXQ-783 adjudication and belongs to governance. Root cause (pinned structurally by tests/contracts/test_zworld_encoder_guard.py C3/C4): NO optimizer inside _train_all_on_agent covers ANY latent_stack parameter -- e2.parameters() (18), lateral_pfc.bias_head_parameters() (4), ofc.devaluation_bias_head_parameters() (4) all have ZERO overlap with the 61 latent_stack tensors, so p1_episodes>0 does not rescue it (P1 trains heads DOWNSTREAM of the encoder). Measured exposure, all four drivers bit-identical: 0/61 latent_stack, 0/4 world_encoder, max|delta| = 0.000e+00 (D3_hazard_free rung, seed 42, p0=p1=3, steps=20). Guard sits at each driver's OWN call site, never inside x734._train_all_on_agent, because 737 and 742 import that function and need different strictness. Shared shaper zworld_precondition() gives all four drivers one record shape (strict '>' comparator against a 0.0 floor: bit-identity is the signature, so an inclusive floor would recompute a frozen projection as MET). Diagnosis: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/zworld_bc_install_failure_V3-EXQ-780_2026-07-19.md. STRICT CHOICE = NON-STRICT (RECORD, do not refuse). JUSTIFICATION: this probe asks whether a policy HEAD trained on top of z_world reaches competence -- a question about the READOUT, not about whether z_world was learned. A frozen random projection does not void the run; it RE-LABELS the question from 'is the learned z_world sufficient' to 'is a frozen random projection sufficient', which remains informative, and the ppo_raw_obs control is entirely unaffected and remains the discriminating comparison. Refusing would destroy a usable result; silently scoring it as a learned-representation result would license a wrong claim. So the guard records loudly (GUARD-WARNING on stderr+stdout) and the interpretation prose is amended so no reader can mistake the z_world arm for a learned-representation result. Guard entries go to interpretation.recorded_preconditions, NOT the flat interpretation.preconditions[], for the same arm-blind-indexer reason as 742a. No substrate_not_ready_requeue and no non_degenerate:false -- the run is interpretable.

items.title: Trained all-ON capability point re-run under the zworld encoder guard (STRICT policy; ree_trained_allon arm refused, anchors preserved)
items.note: ZWORLD-GUARD RE-RUN. Re-runs the driver with the untrained-world-encoder guard (experiments/_lib/zworld_encoder_guard.py) wired into its warmup call site. DETECTION ONLY -- no attempt is made to make the encoder train; that fix has a second part (the SD-018 head supervises max(resource_field_view), which decodes the demonstrator's action at chance, 0.2552 vs a 0.2534 floor) and the naive 'enable prescribed P0' is REFUTED in-corpus by SD-070 (prescribed P0 at dim=128 collapses z_world, participation ratio 9.21 -> 1.06). The fix is downstream of the V3-EXQ-783 adjudication and belongs to governance. Root cause (pinned structurally by tests/contracts/test_zworld_encoder_guard.py C3/C4): NO optimizer inside _train_all_on_agent covers ANY latent_stack parameter -- e2.parameters() (18), lateral_pfc.bias_head_parameters() (4), ofc.devaluation_bias_head_parameters() (4) all have ZERO overlap with the 61 latent_stack tensors, so p1_episodes>0 does not rescue it (P1 trains heads DOWNSTREAM of the encoder). Measured exposure, all four drivers bit-identical: 0/61 latent_stack, 0/4 world_encoder, max|delta| = 0.000e+00 (D3_hazard_free rung, seed 42, p0=p1=3, steps=20). Guard sits at each driver's OWN call site, never inside x734._train_all_on_agent, because 737 and 742 import that function and need different strictness. Shared shaper zworld_precondition() gives all four drivers one record shape (strict '>' comparator against a 0.0 floor: bit-identity is the signature, so an inclusive floor would recompute a frozen projection as MET). Diagnosis: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/zworld_bc_install_failure_V3-EXQ-780_2026-07-19.md. STRICT CHOICE = STRICT (REFUSE the arm). JUSTIFICATION: this is the clearest strict case in the fanout. The script is NAMED 'trained_allon' and its P0 comment claimed a 'world-model (encoder/e2) warmup' the code does not perform (that comment is corrected in this change). The ree_trained_allon arm's premise REQUIRES a learned world representation, so the arm is REFUSED, not annotated. CRITICAL: the refusal is ARM-scoped, never RUN-scoped. The guard raises as designed (strict=True) and the driver CATCHES it, so the process does not abort -- a bare raise would produce a runner ERROR with NO manifest (the exposure would survive only in runner_status, not as evidence) and would destroy the random_walk/greedy_oracle yardstick arms, whose premise never involved z_world. Per the V3-EXQ-785 non-vacating rule, non_degenerate is ANY-arm-green, not all-arms-green. Dry-run smoke PASS (exit 0): per_arm_gate green=[random_walk, greedy_oracle] red=[ree_trained_allon], non_degenerate=True, outcome FAIL, label substrate_not_ready_requeue (NEVER a substrate-verdict label). Refused capability numbers are still emitted behind trained_allon_capability_valid:False and a '[refused]' stdout prefix so they stay auditable rather than silently dropped. EXPECT this run to record a refusal, not a capability point -- that recorded verdict IS the deliverable.

items.title: Env-difficulty competence-recovery sweep re-run under the zworld encoder guard (STRICT policy; ree arm refused per rung, PPO/oracle/random preserved)
items.note: ZWORLD-GUARD RE-RUN. Re-runs the driver with the untrained-world-encoder guard (experiments/_lib/zworld_encoder_guard.py) wired into its warmup call site. DETECTION ONLY -- no attempt is made to make the encoder train; that fix has a second part (the SD-018 head supervises max(resource_field_view), which decodes the demonstrator's action at chance, 0.2552 vs a 0.2534 floor) and the naive 'enable prescribed P0' is REFUTED in-corpus by SD-070 (prescribed P0 at dim=128 collapses z_world, participation ratio 9.21 -> 1.06). The fix is downstream of the V3-EXQ-783 adjudication and belongs to governance. Root cause (pinned structurally by tests/contracts/test_zworld_encoder_guard.py C3/C4): NO optimizer inside _train_all_on_agent covers ANY latent_stack parameter -- e2.parameters() (18), lateral_pfc.bias_head_parameters() (4), ofc.devaluation_bias_head_parameters() (4) all have ZERO overlap with the 61 latent_stack tensors, so p1_episodes>0 does not rescue it (P1 trains heads DOWNSTREAM of the encoder). Measured exposure, all four drivers bit-identical: 0/61 latent_stack, 0/4 world_encoder, max|delta| = 0.000e+00 (D3_hazard_free rung, seed 42, p0=p1=3, steps=20). Guard sits at each driver's OWN call site, never inside x734._train_all_on_agent, because 737 and 742 import that function and need different strictness. Shared shaper zworld_precondition() gives all four drivers one record shape (strict '>' comparator against a 0.0 floor: bit-identity is the signature, so an inclusive floor would recompute a frozen projection as MET). Diagnosis: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/zworld_bc_install_failure_V3-EXQ-780_2026-07-19.md. STRICT CHOICE = STRICT (REFUSE the arm). JUSTIFICATION: its P0 comment claimed a 'world-model warmup' mirroring 728 (corrected in this change), and its ree_trained_allon arm is presented as a TRAINED REE agent compared against PPO / oracle / random. That arm's premise requires a learned world representation, so it is refused. As with 728a the refusal is ARM-scoped and, because this is a SWEEP, also RUNG-scoped: a red ree arm on one rung vacates neither other rungs nor other arms. This matters more here than anywhere else in the fanout, because vanilla_ppo (raw-obs learner-adequacy control) and greedy_oracle remain fully scoreable -- the ppo-vs-oracle recovery comparison across the difficulty staircase survives intact and is still live science. non_degenerate is ANY-arm-green. On a PARTIAL run only the GREEN arms' preconditions go into the flat interpretation.preconditions[] (the indexer reads it arm-blind and would otherwise vacate the whole sweep); red arms are carried under per_arm_gate with a preconditions_scope_note naming exactly which arms were excluded and why. If EVERY arm is red the flat list carries them all and the whole-run verdict is correct. Label on refusal: substrate_not_ready_requeue.

items.title: P-comp: MECH-448 demotion x MECH-449 Go/No-Go composition at PER-COMMITMENT committed-class entropy (2x2 diagnostic; 699 instrument repair -- fresh-select DV, levers_compound withdrawn)
items.note: INSTRUMENT REPAIR of V3-EXQ-699, routed by REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-699_2026-07-20.json (REE_assembly ac2fb64028). LETTER not a new number: the scientific question is UNCHANGED (does MECH-448 demotion compose with MECH-449 Go/No-Go at the committed-class axis) and only the instrumentation was wrong, which CLAUDE.md's EXQ versioning rule puts squarely in the alphabetic-suffix case; the autopsy records a deliberate dissent from an earlier chip that asserted a new number, and cites the 708 -> 708a precedent for the same class of repair. WHAT STANDS from 699: the PASS and the whole C1 readiness battery -- its single load-bearing criterion is readiness-only, the C1e/C1f non-vacuity floors are literally 0.0, and the active-frac / frac_pre_ge2 gates saturate at exactly 1.0, so all seven preconditions are threshold-invariant to the defect. WHAT IS WITHDRAWN: the levers_compound composition finding. 699's primary DV committed_class_entropy_nats was accumulated at driver :882/:899 from int(action[0].argmax()) on the action RETURNED by agent.select_action, once per ENV STEP; on a non-E3 tick ree_core/agent.py:5430 returns the HELD action before e3.select() is reached. The DV was therefore hold-duration-weighted OCCUPANCY entropy standing in for the per-COMMITMENT construct both claims act on (they act at SELECTION). This is a CONSTRUCT MISMATCH, not staleness -- the diagnostics values were fresh (reassigned wholesale at e3_selector.py:2452); the READ was replicated by hold duration. The bias is ALIGNED with the hypothesis (ARM_OFF is the reference for every delta, and an unarmed agent perseverates longer, depressing its occupancy entropy and inflating every d_* including d_both), so no sign-check is available and the CORRECTED SIGN IS UNKNOWN. This is a WITHDRAWAL, NOT A REVERSAL: do not restate 'the levers compound' or 'safe to co-arm' in EITHER direction pending this run -- 699's own CANCEL branch was never ruled out by an uncontaminated measurement either. WHAT 699b CHANGES (autopsy routing requirements 1-8): (1) every per-selection quantity -- committed class, consumed-summary divergence, lateral_pfc bias, CRF state, and BOTH lever diagnostics -- is recorded only on a genuine fresh E3 selection; (2) n_fresh_select / n_latched / fresh_select_yield / replication_factor emitted per arm-seed, the single field whose absence made 699 unrecoverable (n_p2_ticks counts ENV STEPS and swings 3.8x within one seed); (3) BOTH readouts emitted and kept distinct -- committed_class_entropy_nats (PRIMARY, per-commitment, the DV the verdict reads) and occupancy_class_entropy_nats (699's DV verbatim) -- with the pre-registered composition rule applied to BOTH via _composition_verdict_from(), a matched-replay comparison over identical cells/seeds/thresholds differing only in sampling unit (the method used on the 663 driver at ree-v3 5433e3ab1c). The 663 replay bounded that defect at sub-1% but does NOT generalise here: 663's DV is a continuous magnitude whose replication is near-uniform across arms and cancels in the contrast, whereas an ENTROPY over a class histogram is reweighted directly by replication and these arms differ in HOLD DURATION, the very weighting quantity. The 699-instrumented verdict is DIAGNOSTIC CONTEXT ONLY, never a finding; (4) hold-duration mean/median/max/histogram per arm-seed, which directly tests the perseveration argument (ARM_OFF longest holds confirms it; flat bounds it); (5) selected_class_entropy_nats DROPPED -- under 699's instrumentation it equalled the primary DV to 6dp on ALL 12 arm-seeds and carried zero independent information; (6) C1 battery UNCHANGED in predicates and thresholds, the only change being the active-frac DENOMINATOR (now n_fresh_select, the honest denominator for a per-selection gate; the smoke confirms armed arms read exactly 1.0 and unarmed exactly 0.0, reproducing 699's saturation), plus ONE ADDED gate C1(g) fresh-selection sufficiency which 699 could not have had; (7) supersedes V3-EXQ-699 and V3-EXQ-699a on both the queue entry and the manifest; (8) recording core stamped via pack_writer -> manifest_core.stamp_recording_core. DELIBERATE DEVIATION from autopsy requirement 1 and the v3_exq_785a reference, documented in the module docstring: 699b does NOT null the two latches. Nulling _last_selected_trajectory CHANGES SUBSTRATE BEHAVIOUR -- post_action_update (e3_selector.py:3224) falls back to it when _committed_trajectory is None (the ARC-016 deadlock fix) and runs on EVERY step via update_residue (agent.py:8006), so nulling it silently skips running-variance updates and the prediction_error / dynamic_precision metrics on non-E3 ticks with no live commitment; in a COMPOSITION experiment that perturbs the selection dynamics under test and would make this a different experiment rather than a repaired instrument. Nulling last_score_diagnostics is None-safe but also not inert (agent.py:9660 would fall back to authority defaults on non-E3 ticks). Instead a private SENTINEL KEY is stamped into the diagnostics dict before every select_action: select() reassigns that dict WHOLESALE at e3_selector.py:2452 with no early return, so the key survives iff select() did not run; its sole ree_core reader (agent.py:9660) uses .get() with defaults and nothing iterates its keys, so the marker is fully INERT. Same guarantee, zero substrate perturbation. Because the two validate_experiments lints pattern-match on a literal `= None` clear, they fire as FALSE POSITIVES here; E3_DIAGNOSTICS_STALENESS_EXEMPT and E3_HOLD_WEIGHTED_READOUT_EXEMPT are set with that reason recorded verbatim in the script. They must NOT be read as '699b still carries the 699 defect' -- the opposite is true. KNOWN CAVEAT (pre-existing, INHERITED from 699, deliberately NOT silenced): validate_experiments emits an anchor-reachability WARN on the eight readiness preconditions (no assert_anchor_reachable guard). Not exempted, because it has not been discharged -- but empirically mitigated: V3-EXQ-699 MET all seven of these anchors on a real full-scale run, so they are demonstrably reachable rather than unmeetable-by-construction. Flagged for a separate follow-up. GOV-REUSE-1: the decisive readout (per-COMMITMENT committed-class entropy) exists in NO recorded manifest -- 699's is the occupancy variant and is the defect itself, 699a re-emits it unchanged, and no run in the corpus recorded n_fresh_select for this driver, so the replication factor cannot even be estimated post-hoc. Recoverability is explicitly false in the autopsy (no custom_information, no per-tick sink, metrics.json 53 chars, Phase-3 cloud transport carries manifest_bytes only -- thrice-confirmed with 785 and 708). NOT RECOVERABLE -> run. Re-derive brake CLEAR: MECH-448 and MECH-449 each have 0 prior substrate_ceiling / non_contributory autopsies. experiment_purpose=diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING, scoring-excluded. Design UNCHANGED from 699 (2x2 demotion {OFF,ON} x Go/No-Go {OFF,ON}, matched stack, 3 seeds x 4 arms, 350 ep/run). Inherits the precondition-declaration fix (ree-v3 0bfbb42, _min_arm_count) that 699a existed to exercise, since that fix is prospective and already on main. PRIORITY 28 = below the live MECH-457 / zworld-encoder front (30-55) but well above 699a's 5. 699a was priced at 5 on the reasoning that 'the scientific answer is already known, only the record needs repair'; that premise is now FALSE -- the answer is NOT known, levers_compound is withdrawn, and the composition gates the conversion_ceiling_campaign:FULLSTACK co-arming decision. IN-FLIGHT: V3-EXQ-699a was status=claimed by ree-cloud-3 since 2026-07-19T21:05:38Z (~600 est min) when 699b was queued; it is a FAITHFUL re-run of the unchanged 699 driver and will reproduce every defect above. The autopsy recommends dequeuing it via the coordinator, but that is the USER'S decision and was NOT taken by this session. If it completes, its manifest MUST carry the autopsy's evidence_quality_note verbatim, otherwise a cleanly-adjudicable levers_compound lands on the record and reads as CONFIRMATION of the finding withdrawn here -- the worst available outcome. VALIDATION: py_compile OK; validate_experiments --strict OK (0 stale-e3-diagnostics, 0 hold-weighted-readout, 0 precondition-recomputability warnings; 1 inherited anchor-reachability WARN as above); ASCII-clean (0 non-ASCII bytes); dry-run smoke PASS end-to-end (4 arms, 4 verdict lines at 1 seed, 12 at full scale; toy scale self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue as designed); fresh-gating verified live on the smoke manifest -- yield 0.47-0.78, replication 1.28-2.12, armed-arm demotion/nogo fracs EXACTLY 1.0 and unarmed EXACTLY 0.0 (reproducing 699's saturation on the corrected denominator), entropy_defect_delta non-zero and ARM-DEPENDENT (-0.056 ARM_OFF to -0.389 ARM_GNG) confirming the defect is real and does not cancel across arms; validate_recording --strict OK (always-core complete: recording_schema rec/v1, substrate_hash, machine_class, seeds, config, elapsed_seconds).

items.title: P-comp: MECH-448 demotion x MECH-449 Go/No-Go composition at committed-class entropy (2x2 diagnostic; 699 re-run for adjudicable preconditions)
items.note: RE-RUN of V3-EXQ-699 for a CLEANLY ADJUDICABLE manifest. The shipped run (v3_exq_699_pcomp_demotion_x_gonogo_composition_20260623T053755Z_v3) is a sound PASS (interpretation_label levers_compound) that the REE_assembly indexer adjudicates `precondition_unmet` from a DECLARATION bug alone -- the science is unaffected. The gapa_consumed_summary_divergence_all_arms entry reported min(consumed_summary_pairwise_dist_mean)=0.004852 against a 0.05 continuous floor while its `met` was a COUNT-of-seeds predicate (c1b_holds = _maj_all(gapa_divergence), i.e. >=2 of 3 seeds divergent in EVERY arm). min-over-cells is strictly HARSHER than 'a majority of seeds': the run's own per-seed data has 11 of 12 arm-seeds divergent (only ARM_DEM/seed 43 below floor), so the author's met=True was correct and the reported statistic was the wrong aggregator. Driver corrected in ree-v3 0bfbb42 (_min_arm_count; entries now report min(per-arm satisfying-seed count) >= MIN_SEEDS_FOR_PASS, reproducing all(_maj(...)) exactly) -- PROSPECTIVE only, so it cannot fix the existing manifest. WHY RE-RUN NOT MANIFEST-EDIT: the indexer scores the PACK copy (<experiment_type>/runs/<run_id>/manifest.json, build_experiment_indexes.py:868); the flat <run_id>.json is an overlay restricted to _FLAT_AUTHORITATIVE_FIELDS, which deliberately excludes interpretation.preconditions -- so a flat edit is inert and a pack edit would rewrite the historical scoring source. Prior manifest is SUPERSEDED, not corrected. GOV-REUSE-1: the decisive readout (committed-class entropy C2 + the 7 readiness preconditions) IS recorded in the 20260623 manifest, but it is unusable as-adjudicated for the reason above, and correcting it in place is the rejected retroactive-edit path -- so this is a re-run, not a reanalysis. Design UNCHANGED from 699 (2x2 demotion {OFF,ON} x Go/No-Go {OFF,ON}, matched stack, 3 seeds x 4 arms, 350 ep/run); only QUEUE_ID and a new manifest `supersedes` field differ. Re-derive brake CLEAR (MECH-448 and MECH-449 each have 0 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsies). experiment_purpose=diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING, scoring-excluded. Priority 5 = below the live MECH-463 probes (787 pri=60, 785b pri=6): the scientific answer is already known, only the record needs repair, so it should run on idle capacity. KNOWN CAVEAT (pre-existing, NOT introduced here, deliberately NOT fixed): validate_experiments flags stale-E3-diagnostics -- the driver reads last_score_diagnostics per env-step (line ~945) without clearing the latch, and with the default heartbeat.e3_steps_per_tick=10 each genuine E3 selection is re-recorded ~10x. The load-bearing readiness gates are RATIOS and MEANS (demotion_active_frac, excluded_count_mean, nogo_suppressed_mean, rank_preserving_frac), which are invariant under uniform replication, so the PASS is not threatened; what IS inflated is the reported tick COUNTS (n_p2_ticks, f_eligibility_demotion_active_ticks, go_nogo_active_ticks) as sample sizes. Fixing the latch would change the statistics and make this a DIFFERENT experiment (new number, not a letter), defeating the purpose of a faithful re-emission -- so it is left as-is and flagged for a separate follow-up. validate_experiments --strict OK; validate_recording --strict OK on the dry-run manifest (always-core complete, queue_id=V3-EXQ-699a, supersedes set); dry-run smoke PASS (4 arms end-to-end, 12 verdict lines at full scale, toy-scale self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue as designed).

items.title: MECH-448 (ARC-107) rank-preserving F->eligibility demotion falsifier -- INSTRUMENT REPAIR of 689d (fresh-select DV + distinct/gating noise control + substrate-invariance assert)
items.machine_affinity_note: PINNED to a cloud worker at a committed checkout (defect-3 fix). MUST NOT be 'any': 689d's affinity was 'any', the Mac claimed it, and ree_core was edited mid-run against the live checkout, splitting the substrate across cells. cloud-2 chosen over cloud-3 which already carries V3-EXQ-789 and V3-EXQ-790.
items.note: INSTRUMENT REPAIR of V3-EXQ-689d (same scientific question, alphabetic suffix -- the sanctioned 785->785a / 708->708a shape), whose PASS was WITHDRAWN 2026-07-20 by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-689d_2026-07-20.{md,json} (REE_assembly 2e6cc2569b): non_contributory / measurement_test_design_defect, MECH-448 reverted provisional -> candidate, genuine_exp_count 1 -> 0. The entire 689d finding rested on C_PRIMARY (committed-action-class entropy strict-above BOTH collapsed controls), invalid on THREE INDEPENDENT grounds -- all three are repaired here, because defects 2 and 3 SURVIVE a DV repair and fixing only the DV would reproduce a differently-broken PASS. (1) HOLD-WEIGHTED DV: 689d accumulated selected_class_counts per env step (:598; pool at :535) while agent.py:5430 returns the HELD action on not ticks['e3_tick'], so both histograms were weighted by hold duration (cadence default 10) -- DISQUALIFYING for a distribution-shape statistic. FIXED: every per-selection quantity (committed class, proposer pool, cand_world_pairwise_dist, and ALL last_score_diagnostics reads) is gated on a GENUINE E3 selection via a substrate-inert SENTINEL KEY -- the 699b mechanism (ree-v3 2d3a249e01), deliberately chosen over the 785a '= None' clear because nulling _last_selected_trajectory changes substrate behaviour via post_action_update (e3_selector.py:3224 via agent.py:8006). n_fresh_select / n_latched / fresh_select_yield / replication_factor emitted per cell; 689d's hold-weighted DV retained as a NAMED SECONDARY (occupancy_class_entropy) so the defect magnitude is MEASURED, not asserted (smoke shows replication_factor 1.88-3.00 and materially different entropies). (2) VACUOUS MATCHED-NOISE CONTROL: ARM_MATCHED_NOISE (T=2.5) was BIT-IDENTICAL to ARM_PROPOSER_CTRL on every metric on all 3 seeds -- temperature is inert on the deterministic-argmin committed path (the substrate says so at e3_selector.py:2685) -- so the 'NOT noise-as-diversity' half of C_PRIMARY never tested anything, and 'strict above BOTH X and Y' degraded SILENTLY to 'strict above X'. The pre-registered guard matched_noise_verified_lifting:false fired and did NOT block the PASS. FIXED three ways: the noise arm is re-instantiated on MECH-439 Factor B (use_gap_scaled_commit_temperature=True), where _gap_scaled_commit_pick is a real torch.multinomial on the COMMITTED path (verified independent of Factor A -- _conflict_gap_norm is computed unconditionally at e3_selector.py:2771); a HARD control-distinctness assertion (C_CONTROL_DISTINCT) invalidates the run if any two control arms produce identical committed-class count vectors; and matched_noise_verified_lifting is now GATING (C_NOISE_LIFTS -> matched_noise_control_unmeetable) rather than informational. Smoke CONFIRMS the repair: the two proposer arms are now distinct (selE 1.0114 vs 1.5650, gap_scaled_commit_active_frac 1.00 in the noise arm and 0.00 elsewhere), where in 689d they were identical. Factor B appears ONLY in the noise control and ONLY as a noise generator -- it is NOT a mechanism under test, and all other MECH-439 levers stay OFF on every arm. (3) INTRA-RUN SUBSTRATE DIVERGENCE (NEW defect class): ARM_ON seeds 43/44 ran on substrate_hash fc6d17ce... while every control AND ARM_ON seed 42 ran on 19b4073c... -- ree_core was edited on the Mac mid-run on 2026-06-21. The split maps onto the finding exactly: the ONLY properly-controlled seed (42) FAILS C_PRIMARY, so C_PRIMARY had ZERO validly-controlled seeds. FIXED: C_SUBSTRATE_INVARIANT requires the set of per-cell arm_fingerprint.substrate_hash values to have cardinality exactly 1, else the run is invalid; and this entry is PINNED to a cloud worker at a committed checkout rather than machine_affinity 'any' -- 689d's note claimed 'Pinned ree-cloud-3' but its affinity was in fact 'any', which is exactly how the Mac claimed it and ran it against a live checkout. (4) POWER: 4 seeds (was 3) with MIN_SEEDS_FOR_PASS 3-of-4 (was 2-of-3, which let one lucky seed carry the finding), and P1 runs until each cell banks 200 GENUINE selections (N_FRESH_SELECT_TARGET, a GATING readiness precondition) -- which also removes the 689d 7.0x arm-exposure asymmetry BY CONSTRUCTION rather than modelling it, since equal env steps do not imply equal selections (689d ARM_ON seed 44: 238 env steps = ~24 genuine selections against a 0.187-nat deciding margin). (5) RECORDING: always-core stamped via stamp_recording_core AFTER arm_results assembly so substrate_hash HOISTS from the per-cell fingerprints -- 689d was missing recording_schema, top-level substrate_hash, machine_class and elapsed_seconds. DELIBERATELY UNCHANGED, per the autopsy's separate adjudication that all three survive on threshold-invariance: C_READINESS (EXCLUDED_COUNT_FLOOR=0.0, strict >), C_RANK_PRESERVING (saturated 1.0), and C_SAFETY (realized per-env-step harm from env.step -- harm is deliberately NOT fresh-gated, the env step being the correct denominator for a harm RATE). Only the instrument feeding them is repaired. RE-DERIVE BRAKE: literal count is 2 for MECH-448 (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-699_2026-07-20 and failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-689d_2026-07-20), meeting RE_DERIVE_BRAKE_THRESHOLD, but recorded NOT FIRED by the autopsy (sec 10) and user-ratified at the Step 8 gate: the category is measurement_test_design_defect NOT substrate_ceiling, the substrate is demonstrably BUILT (readiness / rank-preservation / safety all survive), and the corrected re-run asks a genuinely different question -- 'does the effect exist when measured correctly' -- rather than re-posing the same question against the same ceiling. Refusing instrument repair on a claim whose substrate is already proven built would invert the brake's purpose. GOV-REUSE-1: not recoverable from existing manifests -- the decisive readout (fresh-selection-gated committed-class entropy under a distinct, verified-lifting noise control on a single substrate build) exists in NO recorded run; 689d's own manifest is the withdrawn one and carries neither the freshness telemetry nor a reachable control, and 689h/689g are synthetic-bank selector-level runs with no env loop. PASS (demotion_converts_committed_diversity) restores the embodied env-loop pathway the 689d withdrawal removed -- 689h survives but is purpose:diagnostic, tests demotion_x_gonogo_additive rather than the standalone conversion assertion, and shares the synthetic-bank pathway with 689g. Off-ramps: cardinality>1 -> intra_run_substrate_divergence_invalid; identical controls -> control_arms_not_distinct_invalid; short effective N / under-trained / all-admit envelope -> substrate_not_ready_requeue; non-lifting control -> matched_noise_control_unmeetable; rank frac<1.0 -> rank_alteration_not_prefix_diagnose; no lift -> conversion_ceiling_persists_despite_demotion (MECH-449 / V4 off-ramp). ONLY a C_SAFETY fail WEAKENS. claim_ids=[MECH-448] only; ARC-107/MECH-447/MECH-449/MECH-439/Q-078 untouched; MECH-448 stays candidate (PROMOTES NOTHING; governance applies). validate_experiments --strict PASS (0 warnings, incl. 0 stale-e3-diagnostics and 0 hold-weighted-readout -- both lints fired on 689d); dry-run smoke PASS end-to-end (4 arms, self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy budget as designed, dry manifest relocated out of evidence/). Working-tree-vs-HEAD queue audit clean; committed via ree_commit.py (private index) because parallel sessions hold STAGED experiment scripts in the shared index.
